name: predsea-frontend-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK, API Wrappers, Adapters, and Mocking layers for the PredSea Platform.

scripts.api:generate: mkdir -p src/api/generated && npx openapi-typescript docs/api/openapi.json -o src/api/generated/openapi.ts
scripts.api:check: mkdir -p src/api/generated && npx openapi-typescript docs/api/openapi.json -o src/api/generated/openapi.temp.ts && diff src/api/generated/openapi.ts src/api/generated/openapi.temp.ts && rm src/api/generated/openapi.temp.ts && echo '✨ API contract check passed successfully!'
